title: selaginella geniculata var. tomentosa
intro: Selaginella geniculata var. tomentosa, also known as the Tomentose Spike Moss, is a type of evergreen, terrestrial or epiphytic plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, which contribute to its potential health benefits such as wound healing, fever reduction, and immune system support. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to alleviate various health issues. The Tomentose Spike Moss has been used in traditional medicine for its potential to treat fever, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, and it is also valued for its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties.
